summary: Subscription Billing System - Full testing complete. All 26 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working: Billing page navigation, 4 plan cards (Free/Basic/Pro/Enterprise) with correct pricing, Usage tab with progress bars and exceeded warnings, History tab, Upgrade confirmation modals with Stripe integration info.
passed_tests: GET /api/billing/plans returns 4 plans (Free, Basic, Pro, Enterprise) with correct prices
Plans have correct pricing: Free=0, Basic=999, Pro=2499, Enterprise=4999 INR
All plans have features list and resource limits
GET /api/billing/subscription requires authentication
GET /api/billing/subscription returns current plan (free by default)
GET /api/billing/usage requires authentication
GET /api/billing/usage returns stats with all metrics (stores, products, users, customers, sales_this_month)
Usage exceeded flags are correctly calculated
POST /api/billing/checkout requires authentication
POST /api/billing/checkout rejects invalid plan
POST /api/billing/checkout rejects free plan checkout
POST /api/billing/checkout creates Stripe checkout session for Basic plan
GET /api/billing/checkout/status requires authentication
GET /api/billing/checkout/status returns 404 for unknown session
GET /api/billing/history requires authentication
GET /api/billing/history returns transactions list
POST /api/billing/cancel requires authentication
POST /api/billing/cancel returns success message
GET /api/superadmin/subscriptions returns 403 for regular admin
Super Admin can view all subscriptions with revenue stats
PUT /api/superadmin/admins/{id}/plan returns 403 for regular admin
Super Admin change plan rejects invalid plan ID
Full billing page data flow works (plans + subscription + usage + history)
Billing page displays 4 plan cards with prices and features
Usage tab shows progress bars with exceeded warnings
Upgrade button opens confirmation modal with Stripe info
critical_code_review_comments: Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations library with test key sk_test_emergent
Plans are hardcoded in backend (SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS dict) for security - cannot be modified via API
Usage limits calculated live from database counts - no caching
Checkout flow: POST /checkout -> redirect to Stripe -> return to /billing?session_id=X&status=success -> poll status -> activate subscription
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing demo account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription Billing fully implemented and tested. Navigation: Sidebar > Billing & Plans (scroll down in sidebar to find it). Three tabs: Plans (4 cards), Usage (5 progress bars showing limits), History (payment transactions). Current admin is on Free plan with Stores (4/1) and Users (12/2) limits exceeded. Upgrade modal shows plan features and 'Proceed to Payment' button that redirects to Stripe. Stripe uses test key. Super Admin can view all subscriptions via /api/superadmin/subscriptions and change admin plans via PUT /api/superadmin/admins/{id}/plan.
stripe_integration_note: Stripe integration uses emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout library with test API key (sk_test_emergent). Payment flow creates checkout session and redirects to Stripe, then polls status to activate subscription. NOT MOCKED - uses real Stripe test environment.
